prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of CME stock, I used a random walk model assuming daily volatility of approximately 1.3% based on typical large-cap financial stock behavior. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing widths for higher confidence levels, reflecting the uncertainty inherent in short-term stock price movements.
